scripts.clear-cache: npm run clear-frontend-cache && npm run clear-backend-cache
scripts.clear-frontend-cache: cd frontend && npm cache clean --force && rm -rf node_modules/.cache && cd ..
scripts.clear-backend-cache: cd backend && find . -type d -name __pycache__ -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null; find . -type f -name '*.pyc' -delete; echo 'Python cache cleared' && cd ..
scripts.clean: npm run clean-frontend && npm run clean-backend
scripts.clean-frontend: cd frontend && rm -rf node_modules build && npm cache clean --force && npm install && cd ..
scripts.clean-backend: cd backend && find . -type d -name __pycache__ -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null; find . -type f -name '*.pyc' -delete && cd ..
